section_miscategorizations.text: The right shoulder x-ray is pending.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A pending imaging study reflects an order/plan item rather than an observed result; however, this is a common documentation pattern and not highly misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: The right knee is likely injured.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a vague restatement of the already-documented injury rather than a distinct assessment or diagnostic synthesis; it functions more as a descriptive observation than an assessment, but does not substantially change clinical meaning.
